abilities.name: simple
abilities.description: Doubles the Pokémon's stat modifiers. These doubled modifiers are still capped at -6 or 6 stages.

abilities.name: unaware
abilities.description: Ignores other Pokémon's stat modifiers for damage and accuracy calculation.

abilities.name: moody
abilities.description: Raises a random stat two stages and lowers another one stage after each turn.
